title: Scrub Daddy Original Dish Sponge, Smiley Face Sponges for Cleaning & Washing Up -Kitchen Non Scratch Scourers with FlexTexture Firm & Soft Scrubbing, Dishwashing Scrubber - Yellow
features: Scrub Sponge with FlexTexture Design - Scrub Daddy's smiley face sponges for cleaning utilise FlexTexture material; firm in cold water or soft in warm water for a dual action scrubber sponge. In cold water he’s tough and can remove stubborn debris from dishes without the need for harsh chemicals, a great dishwashing sponge for everyday use

Non Scratch Scourers - Multi-use cleaning sponges for washing up that are safe to use on over 20 different surfaces from glass to marble, porcelain, stainless steel and many more. The ideal sponge scourers, useful as a dish cleaner & washing up sponge for use on dinner plates, in the bathroom, or even on your garden fence

360 Degree Scrubbing Sponge - Sure to become one of your household essentials, each ergonomic smiley sponge has eyes that you can hold onto so you’ll never run into a hard-to-reach place again. His circular shape lets you clean the sides and bottom of containers at the same time, the perfect option for a multipurpose kitchen scrubber

Odour Resistant Cleaning Scourers & Sponges - These dish sponges can simply be rinsed with a few squeezes under warm running water to remove food debris. The FlexTexture design means each dish sponge dries within an hour so it won't mold. It has been independently tested not to hold odours for up to 8 weeks

Easy to Clean Washing Up Sponges - Washing up will never be the same again. These magic sponges for cleaning are easy to use; to clean, place the cleaning sponge on the top rack of your dishwasher or dampen and microwave for 1 minute
description: From the manufacturer Odor Resistant Scrub Daddy sponges are lab tested to not hold odors for up to 8 weeks when properly maintained in addition to resisting stains and rinsing clean after use. Fast dry time prevents odor and staining. Temperature Controlled Scrub Scrub Daddy's FlexTexture becomes firm in cold water for tough scrubbing and soft in warm water for light cleaning. Scratch Free Scrub Daddy sponges and scrubbers are safe to use on over a dozen different surfaces including glass, stainless steel, cast iron, and non-stick coatings. Versatile Smile Scrub Daddy cleans the toughest kitchen and house messes all with a smile on his face. Daddy's eyes provide an ergonomic grip with just two fingers to mold into corners and reach deep into cups, while his happy smile cleans both sides of spoons, spatulas, and other utensils.
